mapper.select: select p.id, p.name, p.type, p.pstring, p.state from permission p left join role_permission rp on p.id = rp.pid where rp.rid = #{rid} and p.state = 1
mapper.insert:
insert into permission
id,
pstring,
name,
type,
state,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{permission,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.delete: delete from permission t where t.id = #{permissionId}
delete from teacher_course tc where tc.tid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and tc.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and tp.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

delete from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and tp.cid in
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select concat(concat(p.pstring, ':'), tp.cid) as permission from teacher_permission tp left join permission p on tp.pid = p.id where tp.tid = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and tp.pid not in(14,40) union select N'system:editUser' as permission from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid = #{userId} and tp.pid = 40 union select N'course:add' as permission from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and tp.pid = 14 union select concat(concat(p.pstring, ':'), tp.eid) as permission from teacher_paper tp left join permission p on tp.pid = p.id where tp.tid = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into teacher_permission (tid, cid, pid)
select #{uid}, #{cid}, #{item} from dual
insert into teacher_permission (tid, cid, pid) select #{uid}, #{cid}, #{pid} from dual

insert into teacher_permission (tid, cid, pid)
select #{uid}, #{item}, #{pid} from dual
insert when (not exists (select 1 from teacher_course where tid = #{uid} and cid = #{cid}) )then into teacher_course(tid, cid, getperbyrole) select #{uid}, #{cid}, #{state} from dual

insert into teacher_paper (tid, eid, pid)
select #{uid}, #{eid}, #{item} from dual
insert into teacher_paper (tid, eid, pid) select tid,#{bid},pid from teacher_paper where eid=#{aid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select p.id, p.name, p.type, p.pstring from permission p where p.type = 'paper' and p.state = 1 and p.id not in(31,34,33,30,37,38)
select * from teacher_permission where tid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and pid =#{pid}
